name: T-Bull S.A.
summary: T-Bull S.A. engages in the design, manufacture, and distribution of games for mobile devices in Poland. The company's games include Tank Battle Heroes, Idle Racing GO, Top Speed, Moto Rider GO, Traffic Xtreme 3D, Best Sniper, Racing Xtreme, Top Boat, Road Racing, and Top Bike. It provides its games through various platforms. The company is based in Wroclaw, Poland.
